feature: 'Save or reset view settings' button appears when current view differs from saved
last_worker_summary: The single-line fix in `tests/board/toolbar.save_or_reset.spec.mjs` adds `exact: true` to the `'View settings'` button locator on line 51 — without it Playwright's substring name-matching also resolves the `'Save or reset view settings'` button, causing the strict-mode violation; `exact: true` constrains it to the literal name and eliminates the ambiguity.
mutation_failure_reason: spec STAYED GREEN after feature was removed — the test is not load-bearing. Tighten its assertions against the specific DOM the feature produces.
